name: Mobidoo
description: Mobidoos sound-based marketing SDK (Soundcode) for offline-to-app attribution in Korea.

seo.title: Mobidoo — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Mobidoo: Mobidoos sound-based marketing SDK (Soundcode) for offline-to-app attribution in Korea.

when_to_use: Sound-based offline-to-app attribution for Korean retail and broadcast
Attributing store visits and OOH ad exposure to mobile app installs in Korea
Soundcode SDK for linking TV or in-store audio triggers to app engagement
Physical world to mobile attribution for Korean offline marketing campaigns

pros: Unique sound-code approach for offline-to-app attribution
Fills a gap TV and radio tracking rarely cover
Concrete O2O use cases such as TV and retail
cons: Very narrow methodology with limited general use
Requires media partners to play ball
review.verdict: Niche but clever offline-to-app attribution tech, useful only as a layer on top of a normal MMP in Korea.
review.best_for: Korean brands running TV or retail campaigns wanting offline-to-app attribution signal.
review.not_for: Non-Korean advertisers or teams needing standard mobile MMP functionality.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
